misconfig_patterns: No auth in server mode — all collections publicly readable
Collection metadata may contain sensitive data class information
Persistent storage world-readable on host filesystem

active_probe.false_positive_check: response must include nanosecond heartbeat field — uniquely identifies ChromaDB

deployment_tells: /api/v1 heartbeat with nanosecond heartbeat field — uniquely identifies ChromaDB
Error messages reveal storage backend type
pivot_paths: GET /api/v1/collections → collection names → query embeddings without auth
Collection metadata → infer data type (medical, financial, personal) and organization
vulnerabilities: CVE-2026-45829 (ChromaToast, CVSS 10.0, UNPATCHED): pre-auth code injection via POST /api/v2/tenants/{t}/databases/{d}/collections with HuggingFace model ref trust_remote_code=true; arbitrary Python exec before any auth check; Python FastAPI server only (Rust server NOT affected); GHSA-f4j7-r4q5-qw2c; ITW confirmed (HiddenLayer 2026-05-18)
sources: Agentic AI for Offensive Cybersecurity (9781806114474) ch04
[CONFIRMED — NuClide Cat-02 survey 2026-06-05; live population observed]
